title: Preserve Group 21 status: G21-6: vacuum-current neutrality
description: Result: J_V scalar residue, far-zone current flux, and Sigma/R zero-net language were audited as diagnostics. Status: UNRESOLVED. Consequence: J_V remains unresolved; J_sub/J_exch remain role-level. Handoff: pure wind is not gravity; exchange is not repair; zero-net exchange needs real operators.
